title: pyrus rannensis
intro: Pyrus rannensis, also known as the Iranian mountain ash, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family. It is used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pyrus rannensis include reducing blood pressure, improving digestion, and providing relief from fever and respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of Pyrus rannensis include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
